name: Flutter
description: Butterflies pinned mid-flight — both wings cut from the same shape, mirrored at the body, beating to a new spread per redraw.

code.style: --fl: @rand(-24deg, 24deg); --rule: ( /* wings share one emitted ink, span and radius; the right wing mirrors the left */ --wc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --ws: @r(20, 30); --wr: @r(60%, 95%) @r(20%, 45%) @r(40%, 70%) @r(20%, 45%); transform: rotate(var(--fl)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(50% - @var(--ws) * 1% - 1%); width: calc(@var(--ws) * 1%); top: 28%; height: 44%; border-radius: @var(--wr); background: @var(--wc); opacity: 0.9; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 51%; width: calc(@var(--ws) * 1%); top: 28%; height: 44%; border-radius: @var(--wr); background: @var(--wc); opacity: 0.9; transform: scaleX(-1); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
